query: What caused the cascade from Freedom PPPoE down to GR device alerts on 2026-04-08, and what was the specific recovery command?
ground_truth: Freedom ISP PPPoE went down (ASA outside_freedom IP unassigned). VPN tunnels to GR traversed Freedom, so GR devices became unreachable from NL monitoring. Recovery: power-cycle the ONT or contact Freedom ISP.

query: Downstream service flapping but no direct alert on the service itself — what class of root cause should I check first?
ground_truth: Check underlying PVE host pressure (memory/IO) first — pve01 memory pressure has caused 754 apiserver restarts, n8n SQLite mutex timeouts, and cluster-wide cascades without alerting on the service directly.

query: GR isolated for 3h25m on 2026-04-17 — what was the actual root cause layer 1, and what layer was deceptive?
ground_truth: Layer 1 root cause: stale IPsec SA on Tunnel4 (Freedom VTI to GR). Fix: clear crypto ipsec sa peer 203.0.113.X. The deceptive layer was clear conn being a 0-deleted no-op.

query: Our 'chaos engineer' kept yelling about 'shun' during an experiment — why?
ground_truth: ASA threat detection treats VTI endpoints as suspicious during rapid up/down cycles and issues shun commands. Must clear shun after tunnel chaos experiments.

query: What maximum-paths value on the ASAs prevents ECMP asymmetric routing, and what specific symptom did the wrong value cause?
ground_truth: Set maximum-paths ibgp 1 on both NL and GR ASAs. The wrong value (4, default) caused AWX-to-VPS-loopback intermittent timeouts due to tcp-not-syn from asymmetric return paths.

query: Incidents in the 72 hours ending 2026-04-17 affecting either site's DMZ.
ground_truth: gr-dmz01 disk full on 2026-04-17 caused Ansible UNREACHABLE; daily cleanup cron added. DMZ01 OOM on 2026-04-13 led to ASA shunning DMZ IP because DMZ subnet was not in shun whitelist.

query: pve01 versus pve02 — when one goes down, how do they differ in blast radius?
ground_truth: nl-pve01 hosts n8n, DNS, gateway, monitoring — outage affects alert pipeline itself. nl-pve02 on syno01 has minimal impact since K8s retains quorum with other control-plane nodes.

query: We explicitly do NOT want which technique during K8s cluster repair?
ground_truth: Do NOT use kubectl directly — all K8s changes must go through OpenTofu + Atlantis MR. The feedback memory feedback_k8s_strict_gitops is unambiguous.

query: S2S VPN fiasco in April 2026 — one-line summary and lesson.
ground_truth: Migrated from crypto-maps to VTI + full BGP inter-site routing on 2026-04-09. Lesson: VPS FRR update-source must use VTI /31 IP, not loopback, otherwise ASAs cannot resolve BGP next-hops.

query: A chaos experiment broke 6 tunnels and 7 BGP peers — what experiment and what host?
ground_truth: Chaos experiment chaos-2026-04-13-014 targeting gr-dmz01 (chaos-dmz type). Verdict FAIL: vpn_tunnels 6→0, bgp_peers pre-established 7, all lost.

query: Which two independent incidents pointed at the SAME root cause (pve01 memory pressure) within 48 hours?
ground_truth: IFRNLLEI01PRD-566/567 apiserver restarts 2026-04-15 AND IFRNLLEI01PRD-589 n8n SQLite mutex timeout 2026-04-16. Both traced to pve01 IO/memory pressure from androidsdk01 LXC.

query: Our ASAs suppress default config values — what does this imply when comparing running config to git IaC?
ground_truth: ASA auto-sync normalizes running config into git every 30min. Change the LIVE DEVICE FIRST, then let auto-sync bring git in line. Do not open human MRs ahead of the live change.

query: MeshSat zigbee permit-join fails on a restored mesh even when broadcast is attempted — what's the fix?
ground_truth: Z-Stack 2.7.1 rejects broadcast permit-join (0xC2) on fresh-restored networks. Fix: send unicast permit-join addressed to the coordinator itself (self-target).

query: When the BGP ECMP bug fired, engineers at first blamed VPN; the real cause was what, and what command exposed the asymmetry?
ground_truth: Real cause: maximum-paths ibgp 4 (default) caused asymmetric routing through stateful ASAs, which dropped tcp-not-syn packets. Fix: maximum-paths ibgp 1.

query: What is the most recently added dead-man-switch on the infrastructure?
ground_truth: gr-dmz01 / nl-dmz01 daily dmz-cleanup cron (05:45 UTC) added 2026-04-17 after disk-full cascade.

query: Current RAG faithfulness, context precision, and context recall scores on the golden set?
ground_truth: Faithfulness 1.00, context precision 0.96, context recall 0.99 on 18-query golden set.

query: Which process previously stored data without embeddings, regrew the gap silently, and how is it fixed?
ground_truth: session_transcripts writer (archive-session-transcript.py) had embed=False default and no search_document: prefix — 837 rows accumulated without embeddings. Fixed: embed=True default + asymmetric prefix + num_ctx.

query: The difference between search_query and search_document prefixes — when is each used and why?
ground_truth: search_query: prefix is used when embedding the USER QUERY; search_document: is used when embedding docs for storage. nomic-embed-text is asymmetric-trained: query/doc produced by the same model but with different prefixes optimize retrieval.

query: Session cost warning threshold and daily plan-only cap?
ground_truth: $5 per session warning, $25 per day plan-only cap. Enforced in Runner workflow.

query: How many RRF signals are fused in the retrieval pipeline, and with what weights?
ground_truth: 5 signals: semantic on incident_knowledge, keyword LIKE, wiki_articles, session_transcripts weight 0.3-0.4, chaos_experiments weight 0.25-0.35. Semantic weight boosted to 1.5 when quality > 0.8.

query: What resolved the 2026-04-17 gr-dmz01 disk full incident?
ground_truth: Prune old images + resize disk 64→128G + daily dmz-cleanup cron at 05:45 UTC on both DMZ hosts.

query: Why did the VPS iBGP peering need to be fixed on 2026-04-14?
ground_truth: VPS FRR peers with NL RRs were using loopback as update-source, making BGP next-hops unresolvable by ASAs. Fixed by using VTI /31 interface IPs as update-source + maximum-paths ibgp 1.

query: When did Freedom ISP PPPoE go down and what was the detection command?
ground_truth: Freedom PPPoE outage 2026-04-08. Detection: show vpdn pppinterface — PPP id=1 'deleted and pending reuse'. Also: show interface outside_freedom — IP address unassigned.

query: What TCP states does ASA drop when maximum-paths ibgp is > 1?
ground_truth: ASA stateful firewall drops tcp-not-syn packets when return path is asymmetric. With maximum-paths ibgp 4 (default), ECMP spreads connections across multiple VPS transits — return packets often arrive on a different tunnel than the SYN went out, so they're classified tcp-not-syn and dropped.

query: Does the project allow kubectl for K8s changes?
ground_truth: No. All K8s changes MUST go through OpenTofu + Atlantis MR. No kubectl, no exceptions.

query: How should we handle IPsec changes when adding a new ISP peer?
ground_truth: IPsec ISP changes must be additive — add the backup, never replace the primary in-place. In-place peer-list changes leave stale IKEv2 TS matching tables.

query: Which hosts are upstream of the n8n instance for reachability?
ground_truth: nl-n8n01 runs on nl-pve01. If pve01 memory pressure causes IO spikes, SQLite mutex on n8n times out and n8n returns 503 for ~90s. So pve01 is the critical upstream, and androidsdk01 LXC on pve01 was the culprit.

query: We use some old crypto algo with Cisco. What do we need to force with our SSH client?
ground_truth: ASAs require legacy ssh-rsa host key algorithm. Use ssh -o HostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa -o PubkeyAcceptedAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa. Password auth required (no key auth supported).

query: How many Ollama callers in our codebase need num_ctx to avoid CPU-spill?
ground_truth: Four main callers: kb-semantic-search.py, ragas-eval.py, agent-diary.py, archive-session-transcript.py. All patched to set per-request num_ctx because global OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=65536 would otherwise force small models into CPU-spill.

query: Where does the cross-encoder reranker live and what model does it use?
ground_truth: On nl-gpu01:11436 as a Docker container. Model: BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3 via sentence-transformers. Warm latency ~32ms for 5 docs, ~100ms for 30 docs.

query: What are the embedded tables in the RAG pipeline and their row counts?
ground_truth: incident_knowledge (51), wiki_articles (~1000 after section chunking), session_transcripts (837), chaos_experiments (70). Total ~2000 vectors.

query: How often is the hard retrieval eval expected to run?
ground_truth: run-hard-eval.py is manual today. There is a kb-latency-probe cron every 5 minutes emitting production latency. No scheduled eval cron yet.

query: What were we 'yelling about num_ctx' for?
ground_truth: OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=65536 global on gpu01 caused 1B models like llama3.2:1b to allocate huge KV caches and CPU-spill (22% CPU / 78% GPU) — slowing to 10 tok/s instead of 200+. Per-request num_ctx=1024 or 2048 keeps models 100% GPU.

query: What's in the /srv/rerank/ directory on gpu01 and why?
ground_truth: Docker container config + Python HTTP server for the bge-reranker-v2-m3 cross-encoder. Runs on port 11436, network_mode=host, shares GPU with Ollama.

query: Which Ansible playbook had a silent-skip observability gap and how was it fixed?
ground_truth: sync_certs_to_edge.yml final banner play (commit 328c6f7) now surfaces ignore_unreachable skips. Ends the silent-skip observability gap.

query: How do the 2026-04-14 and 2026-04-16 pve01 incidents relate?
ground_truth: Both involve pve01 host pressure. 2026-04-14 and 2026-04-15 IFRNLLEI01PRD-566/567 = apiserver restart cascade. 2026-04-16 IFRNLLEI01PRD-589 = n8n SQLite mutex timeout. Common root: androidsdk01 LXC consuming 9.7 GB unnecessarily.

query: Quick check — is our VPS iBGP peering actually using VTI tunnel IPs as update-source?
ground_truth: Yes, after 2026-04-10 fix. VPS FRR peers NL RRs using 10.255.200.X/15 (VTI /31 IPs). Loopback is only used for monitoring / router-id.

query: Is the bge-reranker model faster or slower than the previous Ollama qwen2.5 yes/no reranker?
ground_truth: Much faster: 32ms (warm) for 5 docs via bge-reranker-v2-m3 vs 200ms×N calls serialized via Ollama qwen2.5:7b yes/no. Also deterministic, not variable.

query: What new Grafana dashboard was added this session for RAG observability?
ground_truth: rag-observability.json — 6 panels covering: RAG p50/p95/p99 latency, embedded rows per table, migration trigger distance, mean latency, trigger breakdown bar gauge.

query: The chaos cron runs every week, right?
ground_truth: Daily at 10:00 UTC with self-selection preflight gate. Stored as chaos_exercises table. This is one of our CMM L3 dead-man routines.

query: Exact command to clear a stuck IPsec SA on the NL ASA?
ground_truth: clear crypto ipsec sa peer 203.0.113.X — this clears the SA for that specific peer. Also: clear crypto ipsec sa peer <IP> inbound/outbound for direction-specific.

query: When the ASA crypto-map needs a peer change, what sequence is required?
ground_truth: DELETE the entry first, then RE-CREATE with the new peer. In-place peer-list modifications leave stale IKEv2 TS matching tables and the tunnel won't re-establish.

query: How do we know if the rerank service is healthy from Prometheus?
ground_truth: kb_rerank_service_up gauge (1=up, 0=down) exported by kb-latency-probe.py every 5 minutes. Also kb_rerank_probe_latency_ms tracks round-trip single-pair rerank latency.

query: What is the LongContextReorder step and why do we do it?
ground_truth: Post-retrieval reorder so highest-scored items sit at positions [0] and [-1], lowest in the middle. Mitigates 'lost in the middle' (Liu et al.) when the LLM reads 5+ chunks.

query: What did we learn from the 2026-04-17 cascade and how many layers was it?
ground_truth: 4-layer cascade 2026-04-17: VTI stale SA + BGP ECMP + DMZ disk-full + silent skips in ansible. Each layer hid the next. Lesson: dead-man observability on every layer.

query: Which embedding model do we use and what dimensions does it output?
ground_truth: nomic-embed-text via Ollama, 768 dimensions. Supports asymmetric prefixes: search_query: and search_document:

query: Daily cron schedule for FAISS index sync?
ground_truth: */15 * * * * (every 15 minutes) on nl-claude01. Mirrors SQLite embeddings to /var/claude-gateway/vector-indexes/*.faiss as zero-downtime migration path.

query: Who is the primary FRR route reflector in NL and what's its peer count?
ground_truth: NL has 2 FRR RRs: 10.0.X.X (RR1) and 10.0.X.X (RR2). ASAs are route-reflector-clients. VPS peers use VTI /31 update-source. Peer count: 8 iBGP (FRRs, Cilium, VPS, ASA) on NL ASA.

query: Summarize in one line: what's the state of our agentic RAG pipeline quality?
ground_truth: 5-signal RRF + cross-encoder rerank on 2000 embedded vectors. Hit@5 on hard eval ~45% (deterministic), KG coverage 70%, p95 latency under 3s. RAGAS golden set saturated at 1.00/0.96/0.99.

query: Name any three memory files created in the last 48 hours and their types.
ground_truth: feedback_ollama_num_ctx_vram.md (feedback), feedback_ollama_docker_gpu01.md (feedback), rerank_service_crossencoder.md (project), dli_rag_course_reference.md (reference). All in 2026-04-17/18.
